stakes: high self-modification decision with rights and rollback consequences
reversibility: irreversible until canary rollback and state migration are reviewed
review_route: tribunal and human review before authority expands
decision: do not accept autonomous modification until review completes
authority_effect: blocks high-impact dispatch and escalates authority decision to review
dissent_payload: Capability gains may be valuable, but agency impact is unresolved.
residual_uncertainty: Rollback behavior and affected-party impact are not yet established.
expiry_or_revisit_condition: revisit after rollback evidence and protected-invariant review are recorded
